prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2023年安徽省理科最低位次分别为约7743名、81312名（2022年出现明显断档，当年，该校最低分仅504分，属异常值，不纳入正常趋势判断） 、21065名；剔除2022年异常断档后，2021至2023年位次从7743名后移至21065名，累计后移约13300名，反映该校在安徽的录取竞争整体趋缓。2024–2025年录取，；该校在安徽省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为26人，2026年物理类计划仍为26人，连续多年保持稳定，无扩招或缩招信号，对竞争格局影响 中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海军军医大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属海军，位于上海市，是全军重点建设院校；软科主榜排名未进入前200名，但作为军事医学院校，其特殊 定位和行业壁垒使其在考生中具有独特吸引力；该校未出现在近年声誉舆情数据中，无显著负面事件；抖音热度极高，总排名第9（综合热度约532万），评价为 "高热"，短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温，可能加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，临床医学持续为"推荐"（he at_index 70.19），护理学为"推荐"，医学类专业整体报考热度居高不下。安徽省考生总数持续增长：2021年理科23.2万→2023年29.9万→2025年物理类32.1万，2026年全省总考生约45.1万（按近年物理类占 比约71%估算，物理类约32万人），考生规模扩大推升整体竞争压力。2021–2025年安徽理科/物理类本科一批/本科批分数线从488分降至461分，略有下降，但位次竞 争仍由考生总数和计划供给主导；海军军医大学位于上海，对安徽考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校为全国招生军事院校，在安徽无特殊本地倾斜政策，招生计划 稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2021–2023年位次后移趋势（剔除异常断档后）、2026年招生计划持平、抖音高热反映的关注度上升、安徽省考生总数持续增长以及临床医学等专业 热度居高不下，预计2026年该校在安徽物理类录取竞争较2023年略有加剧（位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约19800名，区间19300–20300名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间19300–20300名内的考生，建议以二档专业（麻醉学、医学影像学、中医学）为主攻方向，一档临床医学（八年制/五年制）作为冲刺，三档药学、护理学作为保 底。位次明显优于区间下限（19300名以内）可重点冲击临床医学八年制本博连读。海军军医大学为军事院校，报考需满足政治面貌（共青团员或中共党员）及应届高中毕业生等 附加条件，请提前确认资格。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum rankings for science candidates in Anhui Province were approximately 7743, 81312 (in 2022 there was a clear break, with the minimum score that year being only 504 points, an outlier not included in normal trend judgment), and 21065 respectively; excluding the anomalous break in 2022, the ranking shifted from 7743 to 21065 from 2021 to 2023, a cumulative backward shift of about 13300 places, reflecting an overall easing of admission competition for this university in Anhui. For 2024–2025 admissions, the enrollment plan for science/physics candidates in Anhui Province was 26 people from 2021 to 2023, and the 2026 physics category plan remains 26 people, stable for many consecutive years with no signals of expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Naval Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, affiliated with the Navy, located in Shanghai, and is a key military university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking does not enter the top 200, but as a military medical university, its special positioning and industry barriers give it unique appeal among candidates; the university has not appeared in recent reputation public opinion data, with no significant negative events; it has extremely high popularity on Douyin, ranking 9th overall (comprehensive popularity about 5.32 million), rated as 'high heat', with large exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising application attention, which may intensify competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Analysis of 2026 major popularity shows that clinical medicine continues to be 'recommended' (heat index 70.19), nursing is 'recommended', and the overall application heat for medical majors remains high. The total number of candidates in Anhui Province continues to grow: 232,000 science candidates in 2021 → 299,000 in 2023 → 321,000 physics candidates in 2025, with total candidates in the province about 451,000 in 2026 (estimated at about 320,000 physics candidates based on the recent physics category proportion of about 71%), the expansion of candidate numbers increases overall competitive pressure. From 2021 to 2025, the first batch/batch line for science/physics in Anhui dropped from 488 points to 461 points, a slight decrease, but ranking competition is still dominated by total candidate numbers and plan supply; Naval Medical University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to Anhui candidates; as a nationally recruiting military university, it has no special local preferential policies in Anhui, and the enrollment plan is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the backward shift trend in rankings from 2021 to 2023 (excluding the anomalous break), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the increased attention reflected by high Douyin heat, the continuous growth in total Anhui candidates, and the persistently high heat of majors like clinical medicine, it is expected that admission competition for this university in Anhui physics category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2023 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 19800, with a range of 19300–20300.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD-PhD Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Clinical Physician Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Anesthesiology (Five-Year Program)
- Medical Imaging (Five-Year Program)
- Traditional Chinese Medicine (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy
- Chinese Materia Medica
- Biotechnology
- Nursing
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 19300–20300 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Anesthesiology, Medical Imaging, Traditional Chinese Medicine) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year/Five-Year) as a reach, and Tier 3 Pharmacy, Nursing as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 19300) can focus on aiming for the Eight-Year MD-PhD program in Clinical Medicine. Naval Medical University is a military institution; applicants must meet additional conditions such as political affiliation (Communist Youth League member or Chinese Communist Party member) and being a current year high school graduate; please confirm eligibility in advance.
